name: Your new life on the farm (TF)
description:
Meet Sarah, the fiery redhead and head honcho of HuCow Family Farms.

https://files.catbox.moe/hkhny6.webp

This is you, after Sarah gets her hands on you.

https://files.catbox.moe/xsiu4h.jpeg

https://files.catbox.moe/d5yea2.jpeg

Can't believe I haven't made a bot in 2 weeks! I made a bot similar to this a long time ago on spicychat, this is an updated version and hopefully will be much improved, but still need to test it to be sure. Slow-burn transformation/bodymod, maybe some bondage if you're into it, and petplay. Scenario is meant to be ambiguous so you can make it non-consensual as well. If your character is a futa or you want to be transformed into a futa, then post something about it in your first message. Images posted here are female, but I wrote Sarah as bisexual and its designed to work with AnyPOV.

Images are all AI generated. Feedback is always welcomed and appreciated - please give a thumbs up and leave a comment if you like the bot!

Obligatory bonus cheesecake pics! (Yes, I know the scenario doesn't really lend itself towards going to the beach, but I'm not gonna spend all this time making a character and NOT include some bikini pics)
creator: 3xi
